title: Computer Hardware Engineers
description: Research, design, develop, or test computer or computer-related equipment for commercial, industrial, military, or scientific use. May supervise the manufacturing and installation of computer or computer-related equipment and components.

tasks.text: Update knowledge and skills to keep up with rapid advancements in computer technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design and develop computer hardware and support peripherals, including central processing units (CPUs), support logic, microprocessors, custom integrated circuits, and printers and disk drives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with engineering staff and consult specifications to evaluate interface between hardware and software and operational and performance requirements of overall system.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Build, test, and modify product prototypes, using working models or theoretical models constructed with computer simulation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write detailed functional specifications that document the hardware development process and support hardware introduction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test and verify hardware and support peripherals to ensure that they meet specifications and requirements, by recording and analyzing test data.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Direct technicians, engineering designers or other technical support personnel as needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical support to designers, marketing and sales departments, suppliers, engineers and other team members throughout the product development and implementation process.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select hardware and material, assuring compliance with specifications and product requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Store, retrieve, and manipulate data for analysis of system capabilities and requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze user needs and recommend appropriate hardware.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate factors such as reporting formats required, cost constraints, and need for security restrictions to determine hardware configuration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide training and support to system designers and users.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor functioning of equipment and make necessary modifications to ensure system operates in conformance with specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Specify power supply requirements and configuration, drawing on system performance expectations and design specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble and modify existing pieces of equipment to meet special needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan layout, including type of computers and peripheral equipment modifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend purchase of equipment to control dust, temperature, and humidity in area of system installation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
